label: Interhour of the First Hour
description: The Interhour of the First Hour (Mezhduchasiye) is a brief interstitial office appended to the First Hour in monastic practice. It consists of three psalms, the Trisagion, a troparion of the day, and a Theotokion proper to this hour.

sections.label: Fixed Psalmody
sections.notes: The Interhour of the First Hour appoints Psalms 20, 21, and 22 (LXX).

items.label: Psalm 20 (LXX) — O Lord, in Thy strength the king shall be glad
Psalm 21 (LXX) — O God, my God, attend to me
Psalm 22 (LXX) — The Lord is my shepherd

sections.label: Troparia
sections.notes: The troparion of the day followed by the Theotokion of the Interhour of the First Hour.

items.label: Troparion of the Day
items.note: Variable troparion: resolved via Menaion resolver or weekday-theme rubric by HorologionEngine.

items.label: Theotokion of the Interhour of the First Hour

items.text:
Priest: Christ our true God, through the intercessions of His all-pure Mother, of all the Saints, have mercy on us and save us, as He is good and the Lover of mankind.
Choir: Amen.
